name: IIS Tech – Rack Discovery to dcTrack (Integrated)

parameters.content:
## 🏢 IIS Tech – Rack Discovery → dcTrack Integrated Workflow

**Developed by:** [IIS Technologies](https://www.iistech.com/)

### Workflow Steps
1. UI uploads rack photo → Vision AI extracts inventory
2. User reviews/edits table in Chat UI
3. User provides room location + cabinet name
4. Inventory mapped to dcTrack schema
5. Cabinet + items pushed via Sunbird MCP server

### Endpoints
- `POST /rack-to-dctrack` — main action webhook
  - `action: analyze_image` → extract inventory from photo
  - `action: list_locations` → fetch dcTrack rooms/locations
  - `action: push_to_dctrack` → create cabinet + items

## 🗺️ Object Mapping (rack_inventory.xlsx → dcTrack)

| Rack Field | dcTrack Field | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| equipment_type | class | Patch Panel→Passive, Server→Device, Switch→Network |
| brand | make | Exact brand string |
| model | model | Model string |
| form_factor | uHeight | 1U→1, 2U→2, 42U→42 |
| position | uPosition | Slot number in cabinet |
| specifications | notes | Free text |
| ports_interfaces | — | Informational only |

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $('Validate & Route Input').first().json.error, request_id: $('Validate & Route Input').first().json.request_id }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filters: [{ name: "model", filter: { eq: $json.searchModel } }], pageSize: 20 }) }}
